examples: An earthquake hit the area abutting our province.
The first entry maker of the allonge shall sign on the abutting edge.
At first it is two plates abutting each other or sliding past each other.
Lebanon's current claim includes Israel's territorial waters abutting the gas fields it discovered in 2009.
Past a pair of forbidding black gates lies 22, 000 square feet of garden abutting a water canal.
